title: Mavinian cluster-wedding organ
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''[[Mavinian cluster-wedding organ|Mavinian]] cluster-wedding organ''' was an unusual [[Music/Legends|musical]] instrument considered innovative and contemporary during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
